prompt: Using the provided reference photo, recreate the same whiteboard scene from the same camera angle and framing, but enhance it into a cleaner, higher-clarity photo. Remove glare/reflections, increase contrast and sharpness, brighten the whiteboard surface, and make all handwritten text darker, more legible, and neatly preserved in the same approximate positions. Keep the black frame, wall, hooks, and partial heads at the bottom/right edge consistent with the original composition. Preserve the handwritten content, including the visible Japanese words and romanization/notes such as とうきょう / TOU KYOU, きょうと / KYOUTO, せんせい / SEN SE I, ええ / E E, おおさか / SA KA, ありがとう / A RI GA TO U, こうこう / KO U KO U, とおい / TO O I, 大きい, おおきい, 美 / BI, 卵, 木, 休み, でなく / びゃく, ぶっか / BUKKA, ざっし, かぎ, しゅぎょう, 今日, KONBANWA, フィー, and the Spanish notes fluido, fragmentado, and Frag.
